site.disclaimer: UrgeZero is for self-improvement and education. It does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
site.legalEnglishNotice: This legal document is available in English only.

seo.landingTitle: Quit Porn & Handle Urges in the Moment | UrgeZero
seo.landingDescription: UrgeZero gives you practical tools to handle porn urges, track streaks, block distractions, reset with breathing and focus games, and find support.
seo.socialImageAlt: UrgeZero emergency plan for handling an urge in the moment
seo.supportDescription: Contact UrgeZero support and learn how to report an issue.

blog.description: Tips for handling urges, building better habits, and getting back on track.
blog.englishOnlyNotice: This guide is currently available in English
blog.installDescription: Block porn, manage cravings, track your progress, and get support from Coach and the community.

landing.heroTitle: <accent>Quit porn</accent>, one urge at a time
landing.heroDescription: When a porn urge hits, UrgeZero gives you simple tools to pause, reset, and choose what happens next
landing.progressTitle: Keep going, one day at a time
landing.progressDescription: Track your streak, remember why you started, and block the apps that pull you back
landing.progress1Description: See your progress every time you open the app
landing.progress2Description: Save your reason for quitting and read it again when an urge hits
landing.progress3Description: Lock selected apps while you work through an urge
landing.toolsDescription: Choose one simple activity to help you get through the next few minutes
landing.tools1Description: Follow a steady breathing guide until the urge feels easier to handle
landing.tools2Description: Play a short game, or read a fact, short story, or Bible verse
landing.tools3Description: Ask what is on your mind and get a clear, practical answer
landing.gamesTitle: Give your mind something else to do
landing.gamesDescription: Pick a quick game when you need to move your attention away from an urge
landing.games1Description: Flip the cards and remember where each matching pair is
landing.games2Description: Spot the symbol that matches the one shown
landing.games3Description: Tap the color named on screen before time runs out
landing.supportTitle: You do not have to do this alone
landing.supportDescription: Ask Coach when you need a clear next step, or read honest posts from people working through the same habit
landing.support1Description: Ask a direct question and get a short, practical answer
landing.support2Description: See anonymous posts about wins, setbacks, and starting again
landing.support3Description: Post what happened without using your name
landing.faq1Answer: UrgeZero is a self-improvement app for people who want practical help changing compulsive porn habits, bringing together an in-the-moment emergency mode, streak tracking, app protection, breathing, focus activities, Coach, and anonymous community posts
landing.faq2Question: What happens when I start Urge Emergency?
landing.faq2Answer: Urge Emergency brings your own reasons and promise back into view, gives you quick access to breathing and other activities, and can protect selected distracting apps during the active battle when your device permissions support it
landing.faq3Answer: Yes, you can choose apps or supported activity categories to protect during a battle, although availability and setup differ between iPhone, iPad, and Android because each platform controls these permissions differently
landing.faq4Question: Is Coach a therapist or medical service?
landing.faq4Answer: No, Coach offers brief, AI-generated educational support for urges, habits, relationships, and recovery questions, but it is not therapy and cannot provide medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, or emergency help
landing.faq5Answer: You can record the setback, reset your streak, and begin again because UrgeZero treats progress as something you keep practicing, not something one difficult day erases
landing.faq6Answer: UrgeZero is available for iPhone and iPad on the App Store and for supported Android devices on Google Play
landing.altEmergency: UrgeZero emergency mode showing a personal reminder with quick access to activities, breathing, and relapse check-in
landing.altHome: UrgeZero home screen showing an 18-day streak and the Urge Emergency button
landing.altBreath: UrgeZero Breath Sync screen guiding a steady breathing cycle
landing.altActivities: UrgeZero activity menu with Coach, Breath Sync, Bible verses, focus games, facts, and stories
landing.altGame1: UrgeZero Memory Match focus game with pairs of symbols
landing.altGame2: UrgeZero Find Object focus game asking the player to identify a matching icon
landing.altCoach: UrgeZero Coach answering a question about how porn can affect relationships
landing.altCommunity: UrgeZero Wall of Strength showing anonymous community posts and streaks
landing.downloadDescription: Download UrgeZero for iPhone, iPad, or Android and take the first step toward a porn-free life.
landing.waitlistDescription: Get an email when UrgeZero is available

support.title: Support
support.intro: Need help with UrgeZero? Contact support for product questions, technical issues, privacy requests, and account assistance.
support.emailSupportBody: For product help, privacy questions, and data requests, email:
support.responseTime: We typically respond within 24 to 48 business hours.
support.reportBody: Tell us what you expected to happen and what happened instead. Do not include passwords, full payment-card numbers, or other sensitive account credentials.
support.report1: Your device model and operating system version.
support.report2: The UrgeZero version shown in the app settings.
support.report3: A clear description of the issue and the steps that reproduce it.
support.report5: Any error message shown by the app.
support.report6: Screenshots or a screen recording with sensitive information removed.
support.legalBody: Learn how UrgeZero handles information in our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> and review the rules for using the app in our <terms>Terms and Conditions</terms>.
support.deletionBody: To request deletion of any account or personal data associated with UrgeZero, email <email>support@anmisoft.com</email>. We may ask you to verify ownership before completing the request. See our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> for details about deletion and limited retention.
support.featureBody: Have an idea for UrgeZero? Email <email>support@anmisoft.com</email> and explain the problem you would like the feature to solve.
